---
title: "Lady Laura Elizabeth Hampton"
---

## Lady Laura Elizabeth Hampton

**Maiden name:** (Phipps)

### Description

potential contributor

### Biography

Daughter of the 2nd Marquess of Normanby, she married (1868) John Vivian Hampton (1835-1890), and is mentioned as a potential contributor in 1878.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 20th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
